text:

> 
> I've added tip.core into attachment.
> 
> When you connect directly to modem via serial line and send AT commands
> dricetly from keyboard tip work fine. But it's not a workaround for our
> application.
> 
> In this time I haven't any machine with 6.2. Next week I'll try 6.2.
> 
> 	Best regards
> 		Ivo Hazmuk

Since the mailman installation does not handle well with attachemnts
i have placed this coredump on http://www.evilcoder.org/108368.core
the one that wants to resolve this, please look into that file.
